notes: Eight pages of content + unlimited references. Emphasis on reproducibility (code/data URLs in text), broader societal impact, limitations sections. Single-blind review.

sections.name: abstract
sections.heading: Abstract
sections.notes: Motivation, method, key result, significance. No citations. Accessible to a broad ML audience.

sections.name: introduction
sections.heading: Introduction
sections.notes: Problem setting, why it matters, what makes it hard. Contributions as a bulleted list (typically 3–4 bullets). Roadmap sentence at the end.

sections.name: related_work
sections.heading: Related Work
sections.notes: Situate the work. Use subheadings if needed. Be specific about what you do differently. Avoid listing papers without contrast.

sections.name: background
sections.heading: Background
sections.notes: Notation, prior formalism you build on. Skip if problem setting is simple enough to fold into Introduction.

sections.name: method
sections.heading: Method
sections.notes: Core technical contribution. Pseudocode or algorithm box recommended. Equations numbered. Intuition before formalism.

sections.name: experiments
sections.heading: Experiments
sections.notes: Setup (datasets, baselines, metrics, hyperparams), main table, ablations. Every baseline must be cited and run under identical conditions.

sections.name: discussion
sections.heading: Discussion
sections.notes: What do results reveal beyond the numbers? Failure modes, surprising findings.

sections.name: conclusion
sections.heading: Conclusion
sections.notes: Two or three sentences. What was shown, what it opens up.

sections.name: broader_impact
sections.heading: Broader Impact
sections.notes: NeurIPS requires this. Positive and negative societal impacts. Be honest about dual-use risks.

sections.name: limitations
sections.heading: Limitations
sections.notes: NeurIPS expects explicit limitations. Reviewers will list them anyway; preempt with honesty.

sections.name: references
sections.heading: References
sections.notes: Unlimited pages. NeurIPS style uses numbered citations [1].
